description_long: This is a slender, pink bottle with a metallic screw cap and a gently curved silhouette, giving it an elegant appearance. The bottle features a gradient pink coloration, transitioning from a deeper pink at the top to a lighter shade toward the bottom. Decorative floral motifs in white, yellow, and red are printed around the midsection, adding a touch of sophistication and visual interest. The cap is ribbed for grip and matches the bottle's pink color scheme. The surface appears smooth and slightly glossy, suggesting it is made of glass or high-quality plastic. There are no visible signs of damage, and the bottle seems to contain a liquid, as indicated by the coloration and slight opacity.
description: A slender, pink bottle with a metallic screw cap, floral motifs, and a smooth, glossy surface. The bottle appears to contain liquid and is decorated with white, yellow, and red designs.
description_view_0: Front view shows the bottle's floral motif with white and yellow flowers and a clear view of the ribbed screw cap.
description_view_1: This view highlights the side with visible text and a more prominent display of the pink gradient and floral accents.
description_view_2: The opposite side features a large white floral design with less visible text and a smooth color gradient.
description_view_3: Back view displays a cluster of white flowers and a subtle pink gradient, with minimal text or branding visible.
attribute_label_or_branding: There is some cursive text visible on one side of the bottle, possibly a brand or product name, but it is not fully legible. Decorative floral motifs are present in white, yellow, and red.
